seo.title: AI Lyric Video Maker — Make Lyric Videos from Songs, Free
seo.description: Make lyric videos from your song. Upload audio, AI transcribes lyrics and syncs to the beat, generates visuals, preview and export — free, no subscription.

hero.badge: AI lyric video maker — free to export
hero.subhead: Upload your song or paste a link. AI auto-transcribes the lyrics, syncs every line to the beat, and generates visuals. Preview the full lyric video, then export — free, no subscription needed. No video editing skills required.

steps.title: Upload your song
steps.description: Drop an MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, or OGG file — or paste a link. No account needed to start, and no manual lyric typing required. You don't need a video editor or a blank timeline — just your song.

steps.title: AI transcribes and syncs
steps.description: AI transcribes lyrics from the audio automatically and syncs every line to the beat — in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit. AI also reads the song's mood to generate matching visuals.

steps.title: Preview and export
steps.description: Watch the full lyric video before publishing. Confirm the lyrics are accurate and the visuals match, then export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts. Free to export, no subscription required.

whyChoose.title: Why Make Lyric Videos on LyricsVideo.ai
whyChoose.description: Traditional lyric video makers make you type lyrics and drag text on a timeline. LyricsVideo.ai starts from your audio — AI handles transcription, timing, and visuals. You just review and export.

highlight.title: Upload a song, get a lyric video
highlight.description: No typing lyrics, no dragging text layers, no timeline editing. Upload your audio and AI handles the rest — you review and export.

cards.title: AI does the lyric work
cards.description: No typing, no pasting, no timing by hand. Upload audio and get synced lyrics. Making a lyric video has never been this easy.

cards.title: Faster than any editor
cards.description: Traditional lyric video makers take hours of manual timeline work. With AI, go from song to finished lyric video in minutes.

cards.title: Every format from one upload
cards.description: Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok and Reels, or 1:1 for feed posts. Make one lyric video, cover every platform.

items.question: Is this lyric video maker free?
items.answer: Yes. Sign up, get free credits, and export your lyric video — no subscription required, no credit card needed.

items.question: Do I need to type the lyrics myself?
items.answer: No. Upload your audio and the AI transcribes every lyric line automatically, in 50+ languages. Click any line to edit if needed.

items.question: Do I need video editing skills?
items.answer: No. Upload your song and the AI handles transcription, timing, and visuals. Everything happens in your browser — no downloads, no timeline, no design skills.

items.question: Can I make lyric videos for TikTok and YouTube?
items.answer: Yes. Export in 16:9 for YouTube, 9:16 for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts, or 1:1 for feed posts — all from one upload.

items.question: Can I use exported lyric videos commercially?
items.answer: Yes — your exports are yours, including for monetized channels and paid releases. Make sure you have rights to the music you upload.

items.question: What audio formats are supported?
items.answer: MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, and OGG. You can also paste a link instead of uploading a file.

toolkit.title: Lyric Video Maker Use Cases
toolkit.description: One song becomes multiple lyric video assets — from full YouTube releases to short-form clips for every platform.

useCases.title: Singles and releases
useCases.description: Make a lyric video for your single without a designer, editor, or music video budget.

useCases.title: TikTok and Reels clips
useCases.description: Make a vertical lyric video from the hook or chorus that stops the scroll.

useCases.title: YouTube lyric videos
useCases.description: Make a full-length 16:9 lyric video that gives your audio more context than a static cover.

useCases.title: Demo and collaboration previews
useCases.description: Make a lyric video from a rough mix to share with collaborators and get feedback faster.

bottomCta.title: Your song deserves to be seen, not just heard.
bottomCta.description: Upload your track, let AI handle the lyrics and visuals, and export a finished lyric video — free.
